message:
feat: token sparklines + preserve custom prompt inputs across refresh (#62)

- Add per-agent token sparklines to token panel (scanner, reviewer,
  architect, outreach, supervisor) with color-coded SVG sparklines
- Persist token data (per-agent + total) in sparkline history snapshots
  (server + client) so they survive dashboard restarts
- Preserve custom prompt input values across 5s SSE re-renders — save
  input values and focused element before innerHTML, restore after

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
